source_pr.title: bindinfo: support evolve plan
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Support evolve plan for bindings.

### What is changed and how it works?

Add a new background job for evolvement. It will compare the execution time of accepted plans and to be verified plans, which will be accepted if it meets the requirement.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - None

Related changes

 - None

Release note

 - None

root_cause_explanation: The evolve-plan workflow introduced concurrent access to shared binding/cache state (e.g., cached binding record slices) and background goroutines that execute SQL with cancellation/timeouts. Without careful copying/cleanup, this can trigger Go race detector warnings. The fix deep-copies cached binding records and ensures the async SQL execution path properly closes recordsets / drains results after cancellation to avoid data races.
fix_pattern: Avoid shared mutable state in binding caches (deep-copy slices) and ensure background goroutines/recordsets are properly closed/drained after cancel/timeout to eliminate races.

evidence: files: bindinfo/bind_test.go, bindinfo/cache.go, bindinfo/handle.go, domain/domain.go, executor/bind.go, planner/optimize.go, session/session.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go, sessionctx/variable/varsutil.go, statistics/handle/update.go, statistics/handle/update_test.go, util/timeutil/time.go
